subject: [RFC PATCH v4 26/27] cxl: add cxl_mempolicy sample PCI driver

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: No comments or feedback from the original author.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes adding a sample CXL type-3 driver that registers device memory as private-node NUMA memory, accessible only via explicit mempolicy (set_mempolicy / mbind). The driver uses alloc_migration_target() to keep pages on the target node. It also moves struct migration_target_control from mm/internal.h to include/linux/migrate.h.
